name: rtk
install_doc: README: `cargo install --git https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk --tag v0.42.3 rtk`, then `rtk init -g` (writes global CLAUDE.md + RTK.md + filters template) plus the PreToolUse hook its output asks you to add manually. `rtk init -g` runs per-run inside the sandboxed HOME; files/ holds a captured copy for reference.
notes: CLI proxy: the PreToolUse hook rewrites Bash commands through `rtk`, which filters/compresses their output.
